_severity_note: These rules are custom file-level analysis checks specific to the QGIS plugin upload pipeline. Severity reflects the potential security impact of each finding.

rules.check_description: A file inside the plugin archive has its executable bit set. Executable files increase the attack surface and may be run directly by users or scripts.
A hidden file (name starting with a dot) was found inside the plugin archive. Hidden files may include sensitive configuration, credentials, or development artefacts unintentionally bundled.
A binary file was found inside the plugin archive. Binary files cannot be reviewed for malicious code and may contain exploits or backdoors.
A file with a suspicious extension (e.g. .exe, .dll, .so, .sh, .bat, .cmd) was found inside the plugin archive. These file types pose a significant risk and are rarely needed in a QGIS plugin.
